subject: Geography
title: Mapping Hidden Caves with Technology
description: Learn Mapping Hidden Caves with Technology in one minute.

hook.text: Scientists use ground-penetrating radar to find caves without ever setting foot underground.

buildup.text: Drones, LiDAR, and 3D scanners now map cave interiors in hours instead of months.

discovery.text: Muon detectors found a hidden chamber inside Egypt's Great Pyramid—using cosmic rays.

twist.text: The same technology could reveal undiscovered caves beneath cities, farms, and roads.

climax.text: Technology is mapping a hidden world beneath our feet that we've barely begun to explore.

punchline.text: We're mapping the underground without ever going down.

quiz.question: What technology found a hidden chamber in the Great Pyramid?
